description_long: This is a long, sleek limousine with a low profile and an elongated body, featuring a distinct separation between the front driver's compartment and the extended passenger area. The exterior is primarily a light gray or silver color, accented by dark-tinted windows and subtle trim details along the lower edge. The vehicle has a sharply angled front end with a streamlined windshield and multiple rectangular windows running along each side, suggesting a spacious interior. The roof is flat and smooth, with a series of evenly spaced windows indicating multiple seating sections inside. The wheels are not prominently visible, but the overall design suggests luxury and comfort, typical of limousines used for special occasions or executive transport. The asset's proportions and window configuration imply a high-capacity passenger area, likely equipped with plush seating and amenities.
description: A long, silver-gray limousine with dark-tinted windows and a streamlined, angular front. The vehicle features multiple side windows and a flat, smooth roof, emphasizing its luxury and spaciousness.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the limousine, with multiple rectangular windows and a clear separation between the front and rear sections.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sharply angled nose and windshield, with the width and window arrangement visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the elongated body and window configuration along the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat back of the limousine and the alignment of the side windows.
